## Summary
Describe your issue or request.

## Details
Provide all relevant details and context.

## Services Involved
List affected areas (if any): Gateway, Hub, Workers, Realtime, Dashboard, SDK.

## Reproduction or Proposal
If this is a bug, include steps to reproduce.
If this is a request, include your proposal.

## Additional Information
Anything else maintainers should know.
